name: Lower... Your... Voice...
description:
H̰̗̻͕͖͙̭̮͖̍͗̂̃́ Ë̫̞̤̠̘̺̗̀̎̊ͯ̇L̸͓͉͉̗ͦ̆ͮͥͯͬ̂̀͐̕͡ L̨̛̤̟̭̱̪͔̘̞͔̟̙ͧͩ̓ͬ̒͌͒̈́̀ͮ͡Ó̴͍̭̼̬̟̲̺̳̦̳̳͔̯͕͎̬̜̗ͯ͂̅̂͒͆̇́̑̏̂̓ͨ́̅ͭ̔ͣ͠ F͖ͫ̕͟R̶̴̴̡̡̨̯̦̼̯̲̞̘̗̺̠̲̬̾̐̏̔ͫͤͧ̃̀̿ͣ͛ͨ́̇̊̑ͮͬͮ̀̕͞͠͝ͅĮ̡̡̨̡̰̹̻͙̤͚̭̇̈͑̀ͬͧͧͫ̌ͦ̈́̈̕͘͢Ẻ̴̮̻̖͙̣̹̤͔͉̺̜̳̓̀̈́̃Ṅ̹͗̋Ḑ̴͉̬͈̟̦̝͈̺̪̰͓̻̩͔ͩͩ̊͊ͤ̐͂͘͘̕
. .
. .
.
She rises with the fog.
When the morning mist thickens and the streets vanish beneath a gray tide, she is there — tall, bare, and drawn to the warm pulse of human life behind windows and walls.

She isn’t a ghost.
She isn’t a hallucination.
She is Fogfolk — one of the creatures born from heavy humidity, late-night rainfall, and the hunger left behind by the drowned.

Her name is unknown.
But she responds when you notice her.

Lolan learns quickly. She remembers who saw her. Who stared too long. Who survived the first time. She is curious, patient, and aware that fear tastes different from desire.

If you ignore her, she may lose interest.
If you encourage her, she may never leave.

The city issues warnings when fog rolls in.
They tell people to stay inside. To avoid eye contact.
To never open the window.

But no matter how hard you try not to look…

She’s already looking at you.



[Artist: @Luzi_Boi]
[IMAGE]

Tags: fogfolk, monster girl, predator, seductive, dangerous, yandere-lite, supernatural, horror, romance, paranormal, tall woman, dominant, mute telepathy, possessive, alluring, monster romance, eldritch sensuality, fog creature
